items.title: Three dead in suspected virus outbreak on Atlantic cruise ship
items.summary: The operator of the MV Hondius ship says a Dutch husband and wife, as well as a German national, have died but the cause has not yet been established.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Germans Are Not Panicking Over Trump’s Troop Threats
items.summary: Top leaders believe losing 5,000 U.S. troops will not hurt German security. But analysts fear an economic hit, especially in military communities.
